qa_pairs.question: What is the next step after confirming an injection works in the DPM GUI?
qa_pairs.answer: Once an injection is confirmed working in the GUI, the steps can be automated by adding commands to the journal file after solution initialization.

qa_pairs.question: Which setting in the Discrete Phase Model Dialog Box enables updating DPM source terms every flow iteration?
qa_pairs.answer: Selecting 'Interaction with Continuous Phase' in the Discrete Phase Model Dialog Box enables updating DPM source terms every flow iteration.

qa_pairs.question: How can the 'Interaction with Continuous Phase' setting be saved or added?
qa_pairs.answer: This setting can be saved in your CAS file or added via the journal file.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if there are no problems with the injection text file after selection?
qa_pairs.answer: If there are no problems with the file, no Console error or warning message will appear in Fluent.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users see the specified injection name and list its particles and properties after file selection?
qa_pairs.answer: Users will be returned to the "Injections" dialog box, where they should see the same Injection name specified in the "Set Injection Properties" dialog and be able to List its Particles and Properties in the console.
